frames.name: Technology Innovation Frame
frames.description: Presents the story as technological advancement and feature enhancement, focusing on AI capabilities and user convenience
frames.emphasis: New AI features, enhanced user experience, and Google's technological capabilities across device lineup

outlierPerspectives: Competitive positioning against Apple's delayed Siri features
Cross-brand collaboration with Samsung on AI features
missingContext: Privacy implications of AI assistants performing tasks with user credentials
Security considerations for autonomous app interactions
Data collection and sharing practices for agentic AI features
User control and consent mechanisms for AI-driven purchases
Potential liability issues if AI makes incorrect orders or bookings
Market impact on app developers and service providers
Accessibility implications of new visual features
Battery and performance impact of background AI operations
Rollout timeline and geographic availability details
